title: Prism V3 Daily Financial Records
description: Schema for daily financial transaction records in the Prism V3 experiment. Each entry represents one day of categorized spending.

date.description: Calendar date for this daily record (ISO 8601).

records.description: Individual financial transactions recorded during the day.

amount.description: Transaction amount in the user's local currency.

daily_total.description: Sum of all transaction amounts for the day.

monthly_income.description: Optional monthly income reference value, included when income is received or relevant for context.
